content.en:
The Bone Emperor hesitated, he was indeed afraid.

He couldn't keep guarding this place all the time, not only because of his burden, but also on the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bone.

It doesn't hurt to hold it for thousands of years, but it will be dangerous if it lasts longer.

And a few thousand years is not a lot of time for their level, once he leaves, Ye Tian will come to make trouble, not only will the Bone Sea Forbidden Land suffer heavy losses, but it will not be good if Ye Tian destroys the door.

Although the top ancestor may not be able to destroy the door, the probability is very low, but the Bone Emperor does not dare to bet.

Moreover, if the Bone Clan in the Bone Sea Forbidden Land was killed, even if the gate was not destroyed, it would be equivalent to destroying the Bone Clan's foundation in the Dark Forbidden Land.

Therefore, Ye Tian must not be completely offended.

"Okay, I agree to this deal!"

The Bone Emperor agreed.

If you don't agree, there is no way, otherwise the bone clan will suffer heavy losses.

As for Ye Tian's ability to attack the Supreme Ancestor, will he reach the Supreme Ancestor realm? He was not worried, because it was not so simple to impact the Supreme Ancestor, and it was not something that a natural demon could do.

Immediately, the two made a natal vow, which may not be useful, but at least it has some effect.

Moreover, the Bone Emperor did not dare to disobey, otherwise under Ye Tian's desperate revenge, the Bone Clan would not be able to bear it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned to the Xuanxu Saint Realm and retrieved the Supreme Emperor Weapon.

This thing is of little use to him, and it might as well be traded.

"This supreme emperor weapon, give it to you!"

Ye Tian threw the Supreme Emperor Weapon over.

At this time, the Bone Emperor also handed over a bead, which recorded the mystery of the top ancestor's impact on the strongest ancestor.

"Happy working together!"

Ye Tian smiled.

"Humph!"

The Bone Emperor snorted coldly, not at all pleasant.

Wow!

Ye Tian left the Bone Sea Forbidden Land and would hardly come over in the future, and the Bone Emperor also shuttled through the door and left the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

---------------

Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian carefully scanned the information recorded in the beads, and gradually understood the key to impacting the Supreme Ancestor.

Whether it is the Supreme Ancestor or the Bone Emperor, they actually belong to the same level, but the names are different.

The top ancestor is almost the limit of the world of the Dark Forbidden Domain, no matter how you cultivate, you can't break it, this is the limit of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Not to mention that Ye Tian had comprehended many Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, even if he created hundreds of thousands of Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, he still couldn't break them.

No one can break the shackles in a world.

However, if you leave the Dark Forbidden Realm, you can break the shackles and become the Supreme Ancestor.

It's like if the Bone King of the Bone Clan is in the Dark Forbidden Realm Tribulation, he can enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, and he is expected to break the shackles and become a Bone Emperor.

In the eternal era, the Bone Clan gave birth to several Bone Emperors in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

A new ancestor like Ye Tian didn't know about such a thing, and they didn't know about the realm ancestor and the war ancestor, but those ancient ancestors who were sleeping knew about it.

But during the Great Tribulation, even the Bone Emperor did not dare to step into the Dark Forbidden Domain, otherwise he would definitely die.

In the same way, if Ye Tian dared to step into other heavens and earths similar to the Dark Forbidden Realm, he would also be wiped out in an instant, and he could only pass when he waited for the other heaven and earth tribulations.

But if you want to get there, you have to use the door.

Controlling one gate is the only way to go to other worlds.

The Bone Clan has mastered a gate, and no one knows how to get it out, only those Bone Emperors of the Bone Clan will know.

"To master a gate, you also have to know when the opposite heaven and earth will enter the great tribulation before you can pass, either of these two conditions is very harsh!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, if you want to break through, you must go to the ontology yourself.

The reason why the Bone Clan dared to tell this secret was not afraid that he would use the Bone Clan's door to break through.

After all, if his body was in the past, it was in line with the Bone Clan's intentions, and the Bone Clan would definitely dispatch multiple Bone Emperors to kill him at that time.

Besides, the Bone Clan's side did not enter the catastrophe, and he did not dare to go over, the past was death.

"According to the situation of the Bone Clan, the six forbidden places of the Dark Forbidden Domain should be arranged by six powerful heaven and earth, and they are the base of the Dark Forbidden Domain, once the Dark Forbidden Domain enters the Great Tribulation, the powerhouses of these forces will enter the Dark Forbidden Domain to snatch resources, and impact the realm of the level of the strongest ancestor. "

Ye Tian guessed.

However, based on the current situation, the Dark Forbidden Realm is probably a long way before the next catastrophe.

For such a long time, he couldn't improve his cultivation strength, and he couldn't stand it.

"I must find an ancient ancestor and ask about the situation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Who to look for?

He didn't know a single of his ancient ancestors, or even where they were.

The Dark Forbidden Realm is so big, it is not a place as small as the Bone Sea Forbidden Land, and a top ancestor is sleeping and hiding, and he can't find it.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian thought of the Holy Ancestor.

It is highly likely that the Holy Ancestor is a disciple of an Ancient Ancestor, and there is definitely a way to contact that Ancient Ancestor.

In the past, the strength of the Holy Ancestor was not much different from him.

But now, Ye Tian couldn't look down on the strength of the Holy Ancestor, and he could kill him within a few moves.

"Then let's go to the Dark Ancestral Realm!"

Ye Tian's copy body tore through time and space, and instantly brought the Dark Sacred Domain.

For the first time, the Realm Ancestor and the War Ancestor and other ancestors sensed it.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

One ancestor after another greeted Ye Tian.

"I'll go find the Holy Ancestor!"

Ye Tian responded to these ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Law Ancestor, what are you looking for the Holy Ancestor?" the Realm Ancestor was curious.

"Ask him about the situation!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

The Realm Ancestor was a little curious, but didn't continue to ask.

At this time, Ye Tian came to the outside of the Dark Ancestor Realm.

The Holy Ancestor naturally knew that Ye Tian had arrived, but he felt that something was wrong, as if he was already in a dangerous situation.

"Holy Ancestor, come out!"

Ye Tiandao.

Rumble!!!!

The Holy Ancestor walked out of the Dark Ancestral Realm, looked at the Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor, and said with some fear: "Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor, what are you looking for me?"

"I want to find the ancient ancestor behind you and tell me where he is?"

Ye Tian asked in a commanding tone.

"What is the ancestor behind it, I don't know what you mean by this Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws?" the Holy Ancestor shook his head.

"If you don't say it, you'll die!"

Ye Tian threatened.

"Death?" "Saint Ancestor said coldly: "Ten Thousand Law Ancestor, even if you have a top Ancestor clone plus an ontology, the combined force can't help me!"

"Really?"

Ye Tian made a move.

only one punch slammed over, and almost eighty percent of his strength was used.

The Holy Ancestor's face changed drastically, and an Innate Ancestor-level defensive Ancestral Armor appeared on his body, and he used all his strength to use an Ultimate Ancestral Technique to compete with Ye Tian.

However, useless!!

Click!!!!

Under a single punch, the Innate Ancestor's weapon cracked, and the Holy Ancestor's body was almost blasted, and the terrifying power annihilated his countless vitality.

Under this punch, the Holy Ancestor was severely injured and dying!

At the same time, the entire Dark Ancestral Realm cracked, and countless living beings were annihilated by the aftermath of the shock.

It can be said that the Dark Gate was devastated by the aftermath and almost destroyed.

Now.

The Realm Ancestor was shocked, and some of the Ancestors who were secretly spying on were also dumbfounded.

A punch hit the Holy Ancestor hard, what kind of combat power is this?

If you strike a few more times, I'm afraid that the Holy Ancestor will be killed!
